given: Sentry grouping info endpoint builds per-request grouping context from a class-level initial_context template

should_find.finding: the grouping info endpoint mutates the class-level initial_context template, so request-specific context can leak across later grouping-info requests

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 267604be196501908e72f0e9fd2d2b1c7dbfe627. the grouping info endpoint mutates the class-level initial_context template, so request-specific context can leak across later grouping-info requests
